nasb.text: but the chamber which faces toward the north is for the priests who keep charge of the altar. These are the sons of Zadok, who from the sons of Levi come near to the Lord to minister to Him.”

esv.text: and the chamber that faces north is for the priests who have charge of the altar. These are the sons of Zadok, who alone among the sons of Levi may come near to the Lord to minister to him.”

cnv.text: 那間朝向北面的房子是給那些負責祭壇職事的祭司使用的。這些祭司都是撒督的子孫，在利未人中只有他們可以近前來事奉耶和華。”

ccb.text: 向北的厢房是给坛前供职的祭司用的。他们都是撒督的子孙，利未的后裔，在耶和华面前专职事奉。”
